summary: The matrix directive produces a list of dictionaries (aka an array of objects) for the record.
The matrix directive creates a list of dictionaries by looping over all records in the indicated table.
The collate field in matrix directives groups record data into dictionaries based on a specified field value.
The fields_to_headers field changes matrix directive behavior to copy all fields from input records as is into the dictionary.
The exclusion_headers field in matrix directives allows excluding specific fields from being added.
The values_to_str field in matrix directives can convert all field values to strings.
